name: accounting firms managing 5–15 clients/month tool
description: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients/month, manual calculations cause delays in report generation. We automate depreciation schedules instead of manual spreadsheets and calculations.
problem_solved: Manual calculations of fixed asset depreciation lead to errors and inefficiencies.
